name: Tea Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar replacement.
2. Cut in cold margarine as for pie crust.
3. Beat egg and evaporated milk together thoroughly; stir into the flour mixture.
4. Knead gently on lightly floured board.
5. Divide the dough in half; roll each half into circles.
6. Cut the circles into quarters.
7. Place on lightly greased cookie sheet.
8. Brush tops with milk.
9. Bake at 450°F for 15 minutes or until done.
Food Exchange per serving of Basic Tea Scones: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE CAL: 34
